message: Node started: Determine the minimum value of k(n). First, check if k(n)=2 is possible by determining if there exist integers a and b such that 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b (which is equivalent to 2^a(1 + 2^{b-a})). If no such a, b exist, prove that k(n)=3 is achievable by finding an integer n such that 2023*n is of the form 2^x + 2^y + 2^z.
